text.title: ADA Title II Compliance 2026 Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree from observable signals to a rule-grounded conclusion.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the entity bound by Title II?

conclusion.verdict: Title II does not apply; route to Title III or Section 508
deadline 2026-04-24; scope public surfaces; audit against 2.1 AA

example.trace: state/local entity with 75k pop → >=50k bucket → 2026-04-24 deadline + 2.1 AA audit

text.example: Trace through the tree producing the leaf conclusion.
